reviews.review_title: PLEASE do not discontinue this app!!
reviews.review_description: Achievement hunting is a big part of my game play experience, and without this there is no way to see and compare achievements anymore at all!!! PLEASE do not take this away without another way to look at these!!!

Personally I think it's very cool to see you're achievements but there is on thing I dont like for an example when I was looking at my omong us vr aceivments I had one for 500 tasks, it would show me the percent on how close I was but it didn't say how many I had done at on point it said I had done a hundred percent but I didnt get the achievement after I did like 2 more tasks I got it. I just think it should also be a little bar underneath saying how many you've done but other than that it's good 
😀

reviews.review_title: Dear Meta...Please Read Before It Goes
reviews.review_description:
As an Avid VR Achievement Hunter, Scoreboards is the only current way to see my Gold Stars for 100% Achievement Completion in games. I can sort by Game and see Completed, Least Completed, Alphabetically, etc. 

Devs still take the time to put Achievements in their games, and all I hope for is that there will still be a way that is as effective as Scoreboards to track my Achievement Hunting Progress and Completions. 

The news of Scoreboards leaving hit our Achievement Hunting group hard, and the unknown of future support has us worried. We literally spend hours in games Hunting Achievements and while it may not be the majority of players, there are many who feel the same way. 

Please don't drop the ball on Achievements and ensure that someway, somehow we can still track our progress. It really would allow us to be lifelong supporters of Meta, which is what we want! 

Thanks for taking the time to read. We hope for an Achievement Filled Future,

-All Achievement Hunters
I can’t even check my achievements because the app crashes every time I attempt to interact with it. Very frustrating
Calill103
I just wanted to see how I some achievements but couldn't that's it really.
its mid
Dumb why cant you delete it..

reviews.review_title: Would be awesome on my phone
reviews.review_description: I keep getting notifications on my phone from games that my friends have passed my score, or got an achievement in. It would be cool to be able to view all achievements/scores here, or another app instead of when I tap a notification, it just brings me to that app's launch page here.

I love achievements and I only buy games with them most of the time so it would be extremely useful if we could just know what game's have them before purchasing or better yet make all games have them as the standard
Give me goals and I feel achieved

The idea of trophies/achievements makes a game much more appealing to me, but it has to be implemented correctly. 

Currently, when you unlock an achievement, you only see the title of it without description. To be able to see what it means, you have to quit the game you are currently playing to open the Scoreboard app. Very bad UX.

But the fact that I cannot browse achievements on the phone app is even worse UX.

So devs: pls put more focus on the phone app, and also integrate the achievements section in the Quest OS itself so it doesn’t see it as another application, so you can view the details of the new achievement right from your game and continue afterwards.
Title says it all.
Is very good

Challenges were a wonderful idea and I'm glad to see they were implemented. However I feel like the fact you can't see scores via the phone app, are forced to close the game you're playing to view other challenges, and the fact that you can't even compete with rift s users are all downsides and missed opportunities to make them vastly better. I hope to see at least some of these changes implemented in the future and then I will revisit my rating.
Needs to be openable on your phone so you can compare with friends when not on VR and also check what  you need to do next
How can I take this off my home screen ? I was trying to remove it and I believe I have permission to use my storage, Wich I really don't want. Please tell me how to remove.

reviews.review_title: Why is there no option to turn off?
reviews.review_description: Why is there no options to turn off scoreboards? Only turned this on as I was exploring the device; now I can't get rid of it. Looking up in a meditation app and seeing a scoreboard (with arbitrary numbers that I don't actually know what these numbers are referring too) is not very calming and in some ways truly disturbs the experience.
How can I remove this

reviews.review_title: Hate Leaving Apps to See Achievements
reviews.review_description:
Simply put, there are better achievement systems on every other platform.

Tldr if it isn't broken, don't fix it.

I personally think facebook/oculus/meta just wants to do their own thing.

They ignore user feedback as is the usual facebook strategy (or name change in this case).

Problem is, it isn't good.

It works and we have to use it. 

So 1* for lack of ingenuity, imagination, incorporation, and accessibility.

The program itself works fine and functions great but it really shouldn't be a separate program.
